auth.label: API Key
auth.description: n8n API key sent with the X-N8N-API-KEY request header. Create or view API keys in n8n user settings: https://docs.n8n.io/api/authentication/.

extraFields.label: Instance URL
extraFields.description: Your n8n instance URL, such as https://your-instance.app.n8n.cloud for n8n Cloud or your self-hosted public HTTPS base URL. URLs ending in /api/v1 are also accepted.

actions.name: activate_workflow
actions.description: Activate or publish an n8n workflow.

versionId.description: The specific workflow version ID to activate.

name.description: An optional name for the workflow version.

description.description: An optional description for the workflow version.

inputSchema.description: Input for activating or publishing one n8n workflow.

createdAt.description: An ISO 8601 timestamp returned by n8n.

updatedAt.description: An ISO 8601 timestamp returned by n8n.

triggerCount.description: The number of active trigger nodes in the workflow.

connections.description: Workflow connections keyed by node name.

createdAt.description: An ISO 8601 timestamp returned by n8n.

updatedAt.description: An ISO 8601 timestamp returned by n8n.

outputSchema.description: An n8n workflow object returned by the public API.

updatedAt.description: An ISO 8601 timestamp returned by n8n.

outputSchema.description: An n8n workflow object returned by the public API.

actions.name: create_data_table
actions.description: Create an n8n data table with columns.

items.description: Input for a data table column definition.

columns.description: Columns to create in the table.

id.description: The n8n data table column identifier.

type.description: The n8n data table column type.

projectId.description: The project identifier that owns the data table.

createdAt.description: An ISO 8601 timestamp returned by n8n.

updatedAt.description: An ISO 8601 timestamp returned by n8n.

outputSchema.description: An n8n data table.

actions.name: get_execution

A numeric workflow ID.
A string workflow ID.

workflowId.description: The workflow ID associated with the execution.

customData.description: Custom execution data returned by n8n.

outputSchema.description: An n8n execution object returned by the public API.

actions.name: insert_data_table_rows

anyOf.description: An n8n data table row with user-defined columns.

actions.name: list_data_table_rows
actions.description: List rows in an n8n data table with filters, search, and sorting.

type.description: Whether all filters or any filter must match.

items.description: A condition in an n8n data table row filter.

filter.description: Structured n8n data table filter conditions.

sortBy.description: Sort format such as columnName:asc or columnName:desc.

limit.description: The maximum number of items to return.

cursor.description: The cursor returned by a previous n8n list response.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing n8n data table rows.

id.description: The row identifier generated by n8n.

createdAt.description: An ISO 8601 timestamp returned by n8n.

updatedAt.description: An ISO 8601 timestamp returned by n8n.

items.description: An n8n data table row with user-defined columns.

data.description: Rows returned for the requested page.

anyOf.description: The cursor for the next page when present.

outputSchema.description: A page of n8n data table rows.
